summary:
You are given an array where each entry is the price of a stock on a given day. Choose one day to buy and a later day to sell, and return the largest profit you can make.

If no buy/sell pair produces a positive profit, return 0 (you simply don't trade).

examples.explanation: Buy on day 2 at price 1 and sell on day 5 at price 6 for a profit of 6 - 1 = 5.
Prices only fall, so any sale would lose money; the best choice is to make no transaction.

constraints: You must buy before you sell (the sell day comes strictly after the buy day)
At most one buy and one sell are allowed
